title: I See Fire
why_this_song: I See Fire by Ed Sheeran (2013) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: And I see fire hollowing souls
I see fire, blood in the breeze
Oh, misty eye of the mountain below
Keep careful watch of my brothers' souls
And should the sky be filled with fire and smoke

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "fire" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "fire" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "watch" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "watch" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Keep careful watch of my brothers' souls
We got too close to the flame
I see fire, blood in the breeze

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "I See Fire" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "I See Fire" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "I See Fire", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "I See Fire", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "I See Fire" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "I See Fire" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?
